label: Garden Hub
items: New Add-Area wizard — set up a bed's soil, texture, pH, drainage, feeding and light, then plant it from your Shed or by searching new plants (searches add to your Shed too), all in one flow.

On AI plans, the wizard finishes with a suitability review: a 0–100 score for how well your plants match the bed and each other, plus one-tap care-task suggestions, companion-plant ideas and automation tips.
